visuals.title: Shared vs. Distributed Memory Architecture
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Introduction to Parallel Programming</text>
  
  <!-- Main Concept Box -->
  <rect x="110" y="60" width="200" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Parallel Processing
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Sequential Processing -->
  <rect x="60" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Sequential
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Parallel Processing -->
  <rect x="240" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parallel
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Main to Sequential -->
  <line x1="180" y1="120" x2="120" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Main to Parallel -->
  <line x1="240" y1="120" x2="300" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Sequential Tasks -->
  <rect x="60" y="200" width="120" height="100" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="70" y="210" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="95" y="210" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="120" y="210" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="145" y="210" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- Parallel Tasks -->
  <rect x="240" y="200" width="120" height="100" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="250" y="210" width="20" height="80" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="275" y="210" width="20" height="80" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="300" y="210" width="20" height="80" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="325" y="210" width="20" height="80" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="120" y="315" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Sequential Execution
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="300" y="315" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Parallel Execution
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
